content_en:
He who begets a son and names him Muhammad for the sake of blessing, both he and his son will be in Jannah.

Related by Ibn Bakeer and classified fabricated by Ibn Jawzee.

This fabricated hadith promotes irjaa (liberalism ) and gives Muslims the false hope that it is possible to enter Jannah without practising Islam. In order for a Muslim to enter Jannah he or she has to practise the seven conditions of Shahadah which are:

1. Knowledge of what the Shahadah means

To believe in it inwardly and to declare it outwardly Complete submission to Qur’an and Sunnah

To condemn all shades of falsehood

To be devoted to Allah alone in worship

To love and hate for Allah’s sake.

104 Surah Furqaan 25:69

He who begets three sons and doesn’t name any of them Muhammad is indeed an ignorant person.

Related by Tabaraani and classified fabricated by AdhDhahaabee.

He who builds a house bigger than what is necessary will be made to carry it on his shoulders on the day of judgement.

Related by Ibn Bakeer and classified fabricated by Ibn Jawzee.

Hap 1TH 43 To love your country is a part of Iman.

Classified fabricated by Saghaani.

This fabricated khabar promotes nationalism. At present nationalism is a cancer in the body of the ummah, which stunts the spiritual and economical growth of the ummah. This fabricated khabar causes Muslims to call themselves British Muslim, Pakistani Muslim, Indian Muslim etc. So they see themselves as Indian first and Muslim last.

These expressions enhance prejudices and deviations among the believers. The only time a country is worth loving is when Shari’ah is being implemented in that country to its fullest. Hence we love and hate only for Allah’s sake.

A small amount of deeds backed up by knowledge is beneficial, while plenty of good deeds without any knowledge is useless.

Related by Daylamee and classified fabricated by Imam Suyooti.

In order for a righteous deed to be accepted two conditions must be found. 1. The doer has to purify his or her intention i.e. the deed has to be done solely for Allah’s pleasure. 2. The deed has to be done in accordance with the Sunnah of the Holy Prophet 33.

Abundance of knowledge is not a condition as this fabricated khabar is saying.

Beware of the Dunya (life of this world) for verily its magical powers are greater than that of Harut and Marut.

Related by Ibn Abee Dunya and classified fabricated by al Haafidh al Iraqi.

There is no harm in a Muslim working hard for his living and becoming rich. In fact it is better to be rich than to be poor if you have taqwa. Then you will be able to spend for the spread of this deen. Thus the rich man who is grateful is better than the poor man who is patient, because the poor man all he has is patience.

In regards to this dunya Allah 3 said: snl BG eal 28 eS Vyas Tl SIM AU dhsle Land tly

Lai labiy onl sails 554s bh, sis

“But seek, with that wealth which Allah has bestowed on you, the home of the hereafter, and forget not your portion of legal enjoyment in this world, and do good to others as Allak has been good to you and seek not mischief in the land. Verily Allah likes not the mischief-makers,”!”

The Holy Prophet 3 used to say: “O Allah I seek refuge in Thee from Kufr and poverty.”

__ If poverty were any good why would the Holy Prophet 3 seek refuge in Allah 3 from it? Also Umar (ra) the second Caliph used to say: “Poverty leads to Kufr.” The evangelist movements often target poor Muslim countries to spread their evangelism because even they the Christians know that poverty leads to Kufr and apostasy. This is exactly what the evangelists are presently doing in Muslim lands like Africa, Indonesia, Bangladesh etc.

He who made Hajj to the house in Makkah and didn’t

visit my grave in Madinah has indeed treated me badly.

Related by Saghaani in his book of fabricated Hadith p.6. Classified fabricated by Ibn Jawzee and Ash-Shoukaani.

He who makes Hajj and then visits my grave when I die, will be like the one who visited me when I was alive.

Related by At-Tabaraani and classified fabricated by Ibn Ma’een.

These two fabricated khabar give the impression that whenever a person goes to Makkah to perform Hajj; it becomes incumbent on him to go to Madinah to visit the grave of the Holy Prophet S22 _ If not his or her Hajj is incomplete. This is not the case because Hajj is only Makkah, hence to visit Madinah is a righteous and noble act but it is not a condition for your Hajj to be accepted. Upon visiting the grave of the Holy Prophet se we are required to give him salaam. Any additional acts like to make du’aa to him and ask him for things are kufr and shirk. See commentary for hadith 5 for further details on this matter

Chicken takes the place of lamb for the poor of my Ummah and Jumu’ah is their Hajj.

Related by [bn Hibbaan and classified fabricated by Ibn Jawzee, ad-Daar Qutnee and adh-Dhahaabee.

Whenever anyone of you cohabits with his wife let him avoid looking at her private parts because it causes blindness, and also let him avoid excessive talking because this causes dumbness.

Related by al-Azdee and classified fabricated by adh-Dhahaabee and Ibn Hibbaan.

This fabricated khabar seeks to outline some Islamic Adaab in regards to cohabitation except that the meaning of the Hadith doesn’t make sense. Moreover Adh-Dhahaabee said a liar was found in the chain of transmitters called Muhammad Ibn AbdurRahman At Istaree.

The scholars of Islam have refuted this khabar saying: It is illogical to think that Allah 3% would allow a man to cohabit with his wife but forbid him from looking at her private parts.

Moreover Aisha (ra) said: “Zhe Holy Prophet 8 and I used to take a bath from a single pot called Farag.”'””

This authentic hadith of Aisha (ra) contradicts the abovementioned fabricated khabar. Ibn Hibbaan reported that A’taa (ra) was asked about the permissibility of a man looking at his wives naked body, and he asked Aisha (ra) so she quoted this hadith. Since there is no difference in looking at one’s wife when she is having a bath or while cohabiting it becomes obvious that the fabricated khabar doesn’t make sense.

Even though it is permissible for a man to look at his wife’s naked body and vice versa one should not get into the

1” Sahih Bukhari (Arabic/English) Vol. 1, p. 157, No. 250

The Holy Prophet 3 forbade that one should cohabit with his wife before foreplay.

Related by Ibn Asaakir 2/299 and classified fabricated by adhDhahaabee.

There is no doubt that it is better for a man to practice foreplay before cohabiting with his wife. However we cannot say foreplay is fard. The above-mentioned fabricated khabar is insinuating that foreplay is fard, while it is sunnah (recommended) especially if the woman is a virgin. Whenever something is sunnah we cannot make it fard. Also if something is makruh we are not allowed to make it haraam. This is extremism in regards to verdicts and judgements.

As for oral sex this is makruh for Muslims. And anal sex is totally haraam, hence the Holy Prophet 3 said: Anyone who goes to a soothe sayer and believes in him or enters a woman in the anus has rejected faith in what was revealed unto Muhammad.”

It is also haraam to cohabit in front of others or to cohabit while the woman is menstruating. Anyone who does this has to pay an expiation of 4% grams of gold, which he gives in

The Holy Prophet 3 said: Whenever a man calls his wife to bed and she refuses him all the angels in Heaven curse her until morning. ”!"!

This also applies to the men; thus the angels curse the man who avoids his wife’s bed. This is so because Allah 3 said women have the same rights over men as men have over them. Thus Allah 3 said:

“.And they (women) have rights over their husbands as regards to obedience and respect similar to what their husbands have over them to what is reasonable.”""?

"' See Sahih Muslim (English trans.) Vol.2, p. 731, No. 3363. "" See Sahih Muslim (English trans.) Vol.2, p. 731, No. 3366. "? Surah Al Baqarah 2:228.

It is because of this ayah that Ibn Abbaas (ra) used to dress in fine clothing for his wife.

Allah shall call people by their mothers’ names on the Day of Judgement in order to cover for them.

Related by Ibn Adee and classified fabricated by Ibn Jawzee.

It’s a common notion that people will be called by their mothers’ names on the Day of Judgement, but this is not the case. The people who advance this argument say the reason for this is because many women in the Dunya get pregnant by their lovers and falsely attribute the child to their husbands; thus the father is not their real father so Allah 3% will call people by their mothers’ name in order to cover for them.

This argument sounds logical and it’s very popular, however we have a Hadith in Abu Dawud to prove otherwise.
content_id:
Barangsiapa memiliki anak laki-laki dan menamainya Muhammad karena mengambil berkah, maka ia dan anaknya akan berada di surga.

Diriwayatkan oleh Ibnu Bakir dan diklasifikasikan sebagai palsu oleh Ibnu Jawzi.

Hadis palsu ini mempromosikan irja' (liberalisme) dan memberikan harapan palsu bahwa mungkin masuk surga tanpa mengamalkan Islam. Agar seorang Muslim masuk surga, ia harus memenuhi tujuh syarat syahadat yang meliputi: 1. Pengetahuan tentang makna syahadat. 2. Meyakininya secara batin dan mengucapkannya secara lahir. 3. Tunduk sepenuhnya kepada Al-Quran dan Sunnah. 4. Mengingkari semua bentuk kepalsuan. 5. Mengabdikan diri hanya kepada Allah ﷻ dalam ibadah. 6. Mencintai dan membenci karena Allah ﷻ.

Barangsiapa memiliki tiga anak laki-laki dan tidak menamakan satu pun dari mereka Muhammad, maka ia adalah orang yang bodoh.

Diriwayatkan oleh Ath-Thabarani dan diklasifikasikan sebagai palsu oleh Adz-Dzahabi.

Barangsiapa membangun rumah lebih besar dari yang diperlukan, ia akan dipaksa menanggungnya di bahunya pada Hari Kiamat.

Diriwayatkan oleh Ibnu Bakir dan diklasifikasikan sebagai palsu oleh Ibnu Jawzi.

Mencintai tanah airmu adalah bagian dari iman.

Diklasifikasikan sebagai palsu oleh Ash-Shaghani. Khabar palsu ini mempromosikan nasionalisme yang merupakan penyakit dalam tubuh umat. Allah ﷻ berfirman: "Sesungguhnya orang-orang mukmin itu bersaudara."

Sedikit amal yang disertai ilmu lebih baik daripada banyak amal yang disertai kebodohan.

Ini bukan hadis Nabi ﷺ melainkan ucapan para ulama. Namun makna kandungannya benar dan sesuai dengan spirit Islam yang menekankan pentingnya ilmu sebelum beramal.

Waspadailah dunia karena ia adalah ibu segala fitnah.

Tidak memiliki isnad yang sahih. Namun peringatannya memiliki dasar dalam hadis-hadis sahih tentang zuhud dan peringatan terhadap cinta dunia yang berlebihan.

Barangsiapa berhaji ke Baitullah di Mekah lalu tidak mengunjungiku, ia telah berlaku kasar kepadaku.

Sanadnya lemah. Mengunjungi Madinah dan Masjid Nabi ﷺ sangat dianjurkan, namun bukan bagian dari ritual haji.

Barangsiapa berhaji lalu mengunjungi kuburku setelah kematianku, seolah-olah ia mengunjungiku semasa hidupku.

Sanadnya lemah. Kunjungan ke Madinah dianjurkan karena keutamaan salat di Masjid Nabawi berdasarkan hadis-hadis sahih.

Ayam menggantikan daging domba.

Tidak ada isnad yang sahih untuk hadis ini. Daging domba maupun ayam keduanya halal. Tidak ada dalil bahwa salah satunya menggantikan yang lain dalam hal keutamaan agama.

Apabila salah seorang dari kalian berhubungan badan dengan istrinya, hendaklah ia menutup dirinya dan tidak bertelanjang seperti dua keledai.

Ini bukan hadis yang autentik. Para ulama berbeda pendapat tentang hukum bertelanjang saat berhubungan badan dengan pasangan halal. Mayoritas ulama berpendapat bahwa ini diperbolehkan antara suami dan istri.

Nabi ﷺ melarang berhubungan badan di malam Jumat.

Tidak ada hadis sahih yang melarang hal ini. Sebaliknya, berhubungan badan dengan pasangan halal adalah sunnah yang dianjurkan kapan saja.

Allah ﷻ akan memanggil manusia dengan nama-nama ibu mereka demi melindungi kehormatan mereka.

Diriwayatkan oleh Ibn 'Asakir dan beberapa ulama lainnya dengan sanad yang dha'if. Abu Dawud meriwayatkan hadis yang lebih sahih bahwa manusia akan dipanggil dengan nama mereka sendiri dan nama ayah mereka, bukan ibu mereka.
content_ar:
في هذا الجزء نتناول طائفة من الأحاديث الموضوعة التي تستغل محبة المسلمين للنبي صلى الله عليه وسلم وتعظيمهم لشعائر الدين، فتعدهم بالجنة على أعمال لا تستحق هذا الوعد أو بشروط غير كافية للنجاة.

التسمية بمحمد والوعد بالجنة

تداول بعض الناس حديثاً يقول: "من وُلد له ولد فسمّاه محمداً تبرّكاً به كان هو وولده في الجنة". وقد نسب ابن بكير هذا الخبر ثم صنّفه ابن الجوزي رحمه الله في موضوعاته. والحكم على هذا الحديث بالوضع متّجه لأسباب منها:

  • مخالفته لأصول الشريعة التي تجعل دخول الجنة بالإيمان والعمل الصالح لا بمجرد التسمية.
  • أنه يروّج لعقيدة الإرجاء التي تُفصل بين الإيمان والعمل.
  • ضعف سنده وانقطاعه.

خطر الإرجاء على الأمة

الإرجاء اعتقاد فاسد يزعم أن الإيمان يكفي وحده للنجاة دون اشتراط العمل. وقد حارب أهل السنة هذه الفكرة لأنها:

  • تُضعف الدافعية نحو العمل الصالح.
  • تُعطي المسلم أماناً زائفاً لا يستحقه.
  • تُناقض صريح القرآن الكريم الذي يقرن الإيمان بالعمل في مئات الآيات.

قال الله تعالى: {إِنَّ الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا وَعَمِلُوا الصَّالِحَاتِ كَانَتْ لَهُمْ جَنَّاتُ الْفِرْدَوْسِ نُزُلًا} [الكهف: 107].

التبرك بالأسماء الحسنة في الإسلام

لا خلاف في أن التسمية بأسماء الأنبياء والصالحين أمر مستحب في الإسلام، وقد حثّ النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم على انتقاء الأسماء الحسنة. غير أن الاستحباب شيء والوعد بالجنة المطلقة لمجرد التسمية شيء آخر. فالأسماء الحسنة تُعين صاحبها وتُذكّره بالأسوة الحسنة، لكنها لا تضمن له الجنة إلا بتوافر شروط النجاة من إيمان وعمل صالح.

الأحاديث الصحيحة في التسمية

أما ما صح من أحاديث في التسمية فمنها:

  • قوله صلى الله عليه وسلم: "تسمّوا بأسماء الأنبياء"، رواه أبو داود والنسائي.
  • قوله صلى الله عليه وسلم: "إن أحب أسمائكم إلى الله عبدالله وعبدالرحمن"، رواه مسلم.
  • نهيه صلى الله عليه وسلم عن الأسماء القبيحة المعنى كحَرب وضِرار.

منهج النقد في الأحاديث الموضوعة

من أبرز المعايير التي يعتمدها المحدّثون في الكشف عن الأحاديث الموضوعة:

  • مخالفة الحديث للقرآن الكريم مخالفة صريحة لا تقبل التأويل.
  • مخالفته للسنة الصحيحة المتواترة.
  • مخالفته لأصول الدين المقررة كاشتراط العمل للنجاة.
  • ركاكة لفظه وعدم مناسبته لأسلوب النبوة.
  • وجود كذّابين في سنده أو انقطاعه.

وبالتمسك بهذه المعايير يستطيع المسلم أن يُصون دينه من الدخيل ويُبني عقيدته وعمله على الأسس الصحيحة الراسخة.
